name: MoneyGram
description_short: 3900 Perrysville Ave in Pittsburgh, PA — MoneyGram's check cashing and money transfer services operate 7 days a week.
description_long:
The MoneyGram branch at 3900 Perrysville Ave operates as a standalone check-cashing location in Pittsburgh, PA. This location opens early at 3:30 AM Monday through Friday, catering to shift workers and early commuters throughout Pittsburgh. Weekend hours (Saturday–Sunday, 7 AM–10 PM) make it accessible for Pittsburgh residents with busy schedules.

This Pittsburgh location accepts checks for cashing and offers domestic and international money transfers. Call +1 412-200-5428 for information about fees, transfer limits, or current availability. MoneyGram's services here support the community's banking and financial needs.

Bring valid government ID when visiting this Perrysville Ave location. Check-cashing transactions typically complete within minutes. MoneyGram provides a quick, reliable option for Pittsburgh residents who need immediate access to funds or to send money locally and worldwide.
pros: 19 convenient agent locations within Pittsburgh area, with most open until 7-10 PM for working customers
Dual-channel access: customers can transfer money online or in-person at agent locations
Partnership with major retail chains (CVS) provides accessibility in familiar, widespread locations
Agent locations at financial service providers (Ace Cash Express) offer specialized support
Location finder tool allows customers to search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
No stated requirement for bank account, serving unbanked and underbanked populations
Multiple nearby options—closest location is only 0.25 miles from downtown Pittsburgh
cons: Website does not disclose transaction fees, making it impossible to compare costs with competitors
International exchange rates not provided on location pages, a critical omission for cross-border transfers
Dependent on third-party agents (CVS, Ace Cash Express) means service availability tied to partner locations and hours
Limited to money transfer and money orders; does not offer lending, bill payment consolidation, or credit-building products
No information on transfer speed, delivery methods, or guaranteed delivery timeframes
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank accounts
Customers sending money domestically or internationally without an online banking setup
People preferring in-person transactions over digital-only money transfer services
Individuals needing to cash checks or obtain money orders at convenient retail locations
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those making frequent domestic or international money transfers who prefer in-person transactions at widely available retail locations. The primary caveat is that pricing information (fees and exchange rates) is completely absent from the website, making it impossible to assess true cost-effectiveness without contacting an agent directly.
services: In-person transfer pickup and delivery at agent locations
Cash pickup at retail partner locations (CVS, Ace Cash Express)
Account-free transfer service (no bank account required)
Extended hours availability through retail partners
Bill payment services (mentioned in website header)
meta_description: Pittsburgh, PA MoneyGram at 3900 Perrysville Ave. Check cashing and transfers with convenient early morning hours.
